spec_match.rationale: Uses copyStyleSheets to demonstrate stylesheet inheritance across multiple design presets.

interactive.rationale: Design preset picker + open-PiP button drives the popout.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises 'pick a design and open PiP, watch styling carry'; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show the v130-and-earlier baseline (unstyled popout) so visitors who already know DocPiP need to imagine the contrast.

references.rationale: See also has no chromestatus.com link. Rule #3 regression.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables for design system tokens.

openQuestions.title: Show the pre-v131 baseline
openQuestions.detail: Add a 'open without copyStyleSheets' button so visitors see the bare unstyled popout for contrast. The lede references this state but never demonstrates it.

summary: Clean preset demo of style inheritance. Missing the chromestatus reference and never demonstrates the unstyled baseline for contrast.
